text: Thank you for calling support. I have reviewed your account and I can confirm that your request was received successfully this morning. At the moment, the case is already assigned to the fulfillment team, and the latest update shows that the replacement shipment is being prepared for dispatch. I know delays like this can interrupt your schedule, so I will explain the next steps clearly and make sure you leave this call with a confirmed timeline.
speaker: Aria

text: Regarding the invoice, what you are seeing is a temporary authorization hold rather than a second completed charge. That hold is created while the payment processor verifies the updated amount, and it usually disappears automatically within three to five business days. If it remains after that period, I can escalate it directly to our finance team and send you a written confirmation with the case number before the end of the day.
speaker: Aria

text: Since your team is already using the platform every day, it may be worth considering the professional plan once this issue is resolved. It includes automated reporting, manager approvals, and priority onboarding support, which would reduce the manual steps your staff is handling today. There is no obligation at all, but if you would like, I can send you a short side-by-side comparison so you can review the value with your operations lead.
speaker: Aria
